title: EXTRASTAR Outdoor 6 Sided White Wall Lantern Security Light with PIR Motion Sensor Traditional Style Wall Light IP44 with E27 Screw Socket（Bulb not Included）
features: 【E27 Screw Universal】: This wall lamp is equipped with E27 standard base screw, you can use all kinds of E27 screw bulbs. Whether you have LED bulbs or other bulbs, you can install them as you like. (Please note: Our products do not have bulbs, and when you configure E27 bulbs, the equivalent wattage cannot be greater than 60W, and the rated voltage is 220-240V~)

【Premium Quality＆PIR Motion Sensor】: The black paint craft design makes the wall lamp look elegant and atmospheric, coupled with high-temperature die-casting technology and thick glass configuration, the product is more high-quality, quality assurance, beautiful and durable. 100° human body sensing angle and 2-6 meters human body sensing distance.

【IP44 Waterproof】: IP44 can make our wall light be used outdoors with a certain waterproof rating. But please note that IP44 does not mean that the product can be soaked or exposed to rain for a long time, which will affect the product's life. In order to ensure the life of the product, if it rains for a long time, it is best to cover it with a cloth to cover it.

【Wide Application】: The wall lamp with a retro design is classical, elegant, beautiful, and atmospheric. Ideal for patios, gardens, porches, doorways, and more. The atmosphere of home starts with having a wall lamp.
【After-sales Service】: If you have any questions, feel free to contact us at any time, we will try our best to solve your problems.
description: Product Description Product Specifications Applicable Bulb Type E27 （Bulbs not included）Max 60w Applicable Voltage 220-240V~ Waterproof Level IP44 Applicable Scene Patios, Gardens, Porches, Doorways, and more Base Type This wall lamp is equipped with E27 standard base screw, you can use all kinds of E27 screw bulbs. Whether you have LED bulbs or other bulbs, you can install them as you like. IP44 Waterproof IP44 can make our wall light be used outdoors with a certain waterproof rating. But please note that IP44 does not mean that the product can be soaked or exposed to rain for a long time, which will affect the product's life. PIR Motion Sensor The retro outdoor wall light has a 100° human body sensing angle and a 2-6 meters human body sensing distance.
